tools.name: get_configuration_url
tools.description: Returns the URL where users can configure this MCP server - adding, editing, or removing actions. Provide this URL to users who want to customize their available tools.

tools.name: microsoft_outlook_find_calendar_events
tools.description: Finds Calendar Events in your calendar.

instructions.description: Instructions for running this tool. Any parameters that are not given a value will be guessed based on the instructions.

output_hint.description: REQUIRED. Natural language description of what data you want from the results. Example: 'just the title and created date' or 'only items with status active, showing id and name'. A filter will be automatically generated to extract this data.
